next.views.EventShow.ContextBar.clearSta: Clear the status of the event
The event is not cancelled, nor rescheduled, etc…
next.views.EventShow.ContextBar.deleteCo: Are you sure you want to delete this event?
next.views.EventShow.ContextBar.deleteEv: Permanently delete this event from OpenAgenda
next.views.EventShow.ContextBar.duplicat: Load a new event form pre-filled with the details from this event
next.views.EventShow.ContextBar.featured: A featured event appears at the top of the list
next.views.EventShow.ContextBar.invalidE: Edit the event to fix the problem before attempting to change its state again. Alternatively, remove it altogether from the agenda.
next.views.EventShow.ContextBar.markAsCa: The event has been permanently cancelled
next.views.EventShow.ContextBar.markAsFu: New participants are no longer accepted to the event
next.views.EventShow.ContextBar.markAsMo: The event will no longer be attended to at a physical location
next.views.EventShow.ContextBar.markAsPo: The event has been postponed to dates not yet known
next.views.EventShow.ContextBar.markAsRe: The timings of the event have been modified
next.views.EventShow.ContextBar.publishe: This event is published and displayed on the agenda.
This event is visible on the agenda
next.views.EventShow.ContextBar.readyToP: This event has been validated by moderators. It will be published without further changes.
This event has been verified and is ready to be published
next.views.EventShow.ContextBar.refusedC: This event has been rejected by agenda administrators and will not be published.
next.views.EventShow.ContextBar.refusedI: This event is not compatible with the agenda and should not be published
next.views.EventShow.ContextBar.removeCo: Are you sure you want to remove this event?
next.views.EventShow.ContextBar.removeEv: The event will no longer be referenced on the agenda
next.views.EventShow.ContextBar.requestE: This event comes from another agenda. Edition rights are required to change its main fields (ex: title, description, timings...)
next.views.EventShow.ContextBar.suggestL: Suggest a change on the location
next.views.EventShow.ContextBar.toModera: This event will be verified by administrators prior to its publication.
This event needs to be verified and is not ready for publication
next.views.EventShow.ContextBar.transfer: Hand over ownership of the event to another member of the agenda
Transferring ownership is only possible if you have edition rights over the event
next.views.EventShow.DuplicateModal.bigS: You are about to create a new event based on a precedent.
next.views.EventShow.DuplicateModal.remi: Reminder: A single event can be shared across multiple agendas. Do not create a duplicate! Duplication creates a different ad, usually for a new edition elsewhere in time or space, avoiding copying and pasting.
next.views.EventShow.EmailConfirmationAl: The event was sent to {count, plural, one {# email address} other {# email addresses}}.
next.views.EventShow.ShareModal.byEmailS: The event will not be sent to more than 50 recipients
next.views.EventShow.ShareModal.mustSign: You must sign in to share this event on another agenda
next.views.EventShow.ShareModal.shareByE: Type the email addresses you want to send the event
next.views.EventShow.Sidebar.passUnpubli: The offer will be created upon publication of the event
next.views.EventShow.SuggestLocationChan: Suggest a change on the location
next.views.EventShow.rejectModal.motiveI: The motive will be presented to the contributor in the notification sent to him by email as well as directly associated with the status on the event page.
next.views.EventShow.transferOwnershipMo: Ownership of the event has been transferred.
